actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.description: The panther takes the Disengage or Hide action.

tactical_info.positioning: Uses Nimble Escape to disengage or hide after attacks
tactical_info.damage_output: 6 slashing per hit with excellent mobility
tactical_info.key_abilities: Nimble Escape provides tactical flexibility, high stealth (+7)
tactical_info.weaknesses: Moderate HP, relies on hit-and-run tactics
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent ambush predator and mobile striker
